This is the free Material Data Center Datasheet of POLYLAC PA-747 - ABS - CHIMEI Corporation Material Data Center offers the following functions for POLYLAC PA-747 : unit conversion, PDF datasheet print, comparison with other plastics Check here, which other Polylac datasheets, application examples or technical articles are available in Material Data Center Use the following short links to get directly to the properties of interest in this datasheet: Processing/Physical Characteristics - Mechanical properties - Thermal properties - Electrical properties - Other properties - Processing Recommendation Injection Molding Any use of this information falls under the rules of our disclaimer .
